item.name: Griffin Horn
item.description: A large curved horn that emits a tone so deep, it is undetectable by the ears of man. Griffins however can hear the somber note from hundreds of malms away, and will be immediately drawn to the sound.

mount.name: Griffin
mount.action: Summon forth your griffin─half eagle, half lion, all business.
mount.description: Fantastical winged beasts native to the unscalable peaks of Abalathia's Spine, griffins actually have a long history of serving as mounts. Indeed, before the city–state's fall, the Ala Mhigan army maintained a regiment of griffin–back soldiers who would harry opposing forces.
mount.tooltip:
“Spread your wings and soar”
- Highwind Skyways Slogan
